meaning: n.鱼(马来西亚用语,尤指经烹调的鱼)
examples: Mostly fish, ikan bilis and some 'non-poisonous' seafood such as dried oyster and scallops…
Very likely, when locals fish, they would mainly target "ikan - Haruan" or local snakehead, for its juicy flesh and its superior healing qualities for anyone who is recuperating from an operation.
Our disappointment was salved, however, when we received the ikan bumbu bali, a plate of cod fish with pepper sauce that was rich and satisfying.
